sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72042" key="o(doiplani/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁδοι-πλᾰνία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n72042.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">roaming, straying,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:55" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">55</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
